demo_timestamps.description: Physical experiential walkthrough project with the Bentway showcasing an exhibition setup with screens and touchscreen for data interaction.
Virtual reality experiential walkthrough using Workshop XR, capturing data with VR devices, focusing on emotion and sentiment analysis from user interactions.
Demonstration of using Whisper for transcription and Facebook AI's Robert for emotion detection
Description of the Experention Knowledge Graph and its components
View and query the Experention Graph by emotions and artifacts
Exploring experience data using a knowledge graph with a NCP server

themes: Simulation of human experience in design
Simulation of human experiences in design

client_mentions.name: The Bentway
client_mentions.context: Collaboration on a project to capture human experience data using physical experiential walkthroughs.

ai_technologies.name: Facebook AI's RoBERTa
ai_technologies.context: Used for sentiment analysis in a two-step approach with OpenAI's Whisper.

ai_technologies.name: OpenAI's Whisper
ai_technologies.context: Used as part of a two-step process for audio transcription.

ai_technologies.name: OpenAI Whisper
ai_technologies.context: Used for audio transcription in emotion detection process

ai_technologies.name: Facebook AI Robert
ai_technologies.context: Used as an LLM for emotion detection after transcription with Whisper

summary: The video explores a new workflow for integrating human experience into design through Autodesk Platform Services (APS), featuring experiential walkthroughs using both physical setups and virtual reality. It employs AI technologies like OpenAI's Whisper for transcription and Facebook AI's LLM, Robert, for emotion detection, with outputs stored in an Experention Knowledge Graph, to enhance design insights by simulating human interactions in digital environments.
